author: makortel
body: This PR reverts cms-sw/cmssw#50590 for 16_1_0_pre4 because of the weird behavior being investigated in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/50620 . We'll open the PR again to be merged in 17_0_X.
title: Revert "Moved ExternalRandomNumberGeneratorService to GeneratorInterface"
